## Pattern observations

## One thing to fix tomorrow  
Implement a pre-session credit balance check (threshold > $5) and immediate alerting on "Credit balance is too low" errors to prevent silent blindness during critical events like FOMC decisions. Operational monitoring must take precedence over silent error logging.
